text.tspan: Geometric sans serif typefaces have been a popular design tool
ever since these actors took to the world’s stage. Poppins is one of
the new comers to this long tradition.
Rounded geometric sans-serif type design intended for large sizes.

tspan.tspan: TERRAVIVA GREEN #277C77
The primary color is strategically designed to
capture the essence of nature's beauty and
sustainability principles while breaking away from
traditional color schemes. With this unique brand
color, the brand can establish a powerful and
memorable identity that will resonate with customers
and set it apart from the competition.
GREEN HUES
These secondary colors are used for elements or
components that are not as visually prominent
as others. These could include secondary
buttons, less important icons, or other design
elements that serve a supporting role rather
than being the main focus.
CORAL RED #F84E58
The accent color is a contrasting color used
sparingly to draw attention to specific elements or to
add visual interest, creating emphasis and hierarchy
in a design.
